text: Albert Einstein was born in Ulm, in the Kingdom of Württemberg in the German Empire, on 14 March 1879.
Gabriel García Márquez, écrivain colombien, a reçu le prix Nobel de littérature en 1982 pour ses romans et nouvelles.
Die Technische Universität München wurde 1868 gegründet und ist eine der führenden Universitäten in Deutschland.
Tokyo is the capital and most populous city of Japan, located at the head of Tokyo Bay.
Don Quijote de la Mancha es una novela escrita por Miguel de Cervantes y publicada en 1605.
Marie Curie studied at the University of Paris and later became a professor of physics there.
Il Colosseo, noto anche come Anfiteatro Flavio, è situato nel centro della città di Roma, in Italia.
Samsung Electronics, headquartered in Suwon, South Korea, is one of the world's largest manufacturers of electronic devices.
A Organização das Nações Unidas foi fundada em 24 de outubro de 1945, com sede em Nova Iorque.
Fyodor Dostoevsky, a Russian novelist, wrote Crime and Punishment in 1866 while living in Saint Petersburg.
